title: Don Krieg Sets His Sights on the Baratie
description: On pages 9–12, Don Krieg’s arrival turns the Baratie crisis into a pirate siege while Nami’s departure and the looming fight split the crew’s attention.
scene: The Baratie becomes trapped between hungry enemies, terrified cooks, Krieg’s overwhelming force, and the Straw Hats’ personal priorities.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: We've finally escaped from that nightmare!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: We've returned alive from the "pirates' graveyard!"

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: And we'll set sail back to grand line once again...

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: First, we'll abandon this battered old ship that might sink at any moment and take over that floating restaurant.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Your enemies are just a bunch of meals. This should be a piece of cake.

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Bruce yourself! This ship is our restaurant!

summary: This part escalates the Baratie arc from character introduction to open conflict, with Krieg threatening the restaurant and Nami pulling the story toward Arlong Park.
